commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Hot-reload: support adding and removing anvils without daemon restart (Forge-0eu) (#134)

* feat: hot-reload support for adding and removing anvils

Bellows and depcheck monitors were initialized with a fixed anvilPaths
map at startup, so adding or removing anvils in forge.yaml required a
daemon restart. Now:

- Bellows.UpdateAnvilPaths() and Depcheck.UpdateAnvilPaths() allow
  thread-safe replacement of the anvil path maps while running
- The daemon's hot-reload callback detects anvil additions, removals,
  path changes, and depcheck_enabled toggles, then pushes updates
- hotreload.applyChanges properly reports anvil changes instead of
  logging a "requires restart" warning

Bead: Forge-0eu

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review comments for Forge-0eu

- Add anvil path change to hot-reloadable settings doc comment
- Include old/new paths in anvil path change log message
- Defensive map copy in depcheck.UpdateAnvilPaths
- Defensive map copy in bellows.UpdateAnvilPaths
- Retain removed anvils' paths while they have open PRs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
✨ FEATURE: Add Date Range Filtering to v1.6.0

🆕 New Date Filter Options:
- date_range="recent" - Show press releases from last 3 months
- date_range="last_month" - Show press releases from last month
- date_range="last_year" - Show press releases from last year
- date_range="2024-01-01,2024-12-31" - Custom date ranges

💡 Usage Examples:
- [press_releases date_range="recent"] - Recent releases only
- [press_releases date_range="recent" limit="5"] - Last 5 recent releases
- [press_releases date_range="2024-06-01,2024-12-31"] - Custom range

⚡ Benefits:
- Faster page loading with fewer posts
- Better user experience with current content
- SEO benefits from fresh content signals
- Full backward compatibility maintained

🔧 Technical Implementation:
- Uses WordPress date_query for optimal performance
- Database-level filtering for efficiency
- Respects WordPress timezone settings
- No breaking changes to existing shortcodes

🎯 Perfect for:
- Homepage recent news sections
- Archive pages by date
- Quarterly/seasonal content display
- Mobile-friendly recent releases

All existing shortcodes continue to work unchanged!

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add input validation to SnapTrade limits endpoint (#660)

The PUT /api/admin/snaptrade-limits endpoint accepted any value without
validation, unlike the equivalent Plaid limits endpoint. This caused
division-by-zero (Infinity) when estCostPerCall was 0, and NaN
propagation when non-numeric values were passed.

Added the same range and isNaN guards as the Plaid endpoint:
- monthlyBudget: 0-10000
- estCostPerCall: 0.01-100 (must be > 0 to prevent division by zero)
- maxSyncPages: 1-100
- syncCooldownSeconds: 0-86400

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Hot-reload: fsnotify loses watch on forge.yaml after file replacement (Forge-gwy) (#133)

* fix: watch parent directory instead of config file for hot-reload

On Windows, editors that save via write-to-temp + rename cause fsnotify
to lose the watch on the original file inode. By watching the parent
directory and filtering for the config filename, we reliably detect
changes regardless of how the file is written. Also react to Rename
events which occur during atomic file replacements.

Bead: Forge-gwy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review comments for Forge-gwy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 좌표 자동 캡처 — threading+root.after() 방식으로 freeze 완전 해결 (v3.5.8)

- countdown freeze at 1 근본 원인: overlay.after() 불안정
- 해결: threading(time.sleep) + root.after(0, ui_update) 방식
- 캡처 버튼 제거 → 단계 이동 시 0.6초 후 자동 카운트다운 시작
- 이미 좌표 있으면 자동시작 생략, "다시 캡처" 버튼만 표시
- 캡처 완료 후 스크린샷 + 좌표 표시 → "다음" 버튼으로 진행

commit.message:
feat: Add stop hooks for quality gates (#59)

* feat: Add stop hooks for quality gates (#50)

Replace validate-framework.sh with native Claude Code stop hooks that
validate work before returning control to the user.

Changes:
- Add framework/hooks/validate-spec.sh - validates spec.md structure
- Add framework/hooks/validate-implementation.sh - validates against spec
- Update install.sh to install hooks to ~/.claude/hooks/csf/
- Add settings.json merge logic (preserves existing settings)
- Add hooks backup/restore during updates

The hooks run at session end and check:
- Spec has required sections (scope, criteria, risks)
- Implementation addresses spec acceptance criteria

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Fix runout date interpolation when netBurn is negative or zero (#654)

When netBurn <= 0 at the crossover month (e.g. large one-time expense
with net positive income, or income exactly matching expenses), the
linear interpolation produced incorrect fractions. The safeDenom guard
of 1 caused wildly wrong dates, and negative netBurn caused clamping
to 0. Now we skip interpolation entirely when netBurn <= 0 and use
the month boundary instead.

Fixed in both src/utils/computeBurndown.js and src/App.jsx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: disable streaming for Gemini to prevent mid-generation safety cutoffs

Gemini's streaming safety classifier runs at periodic checkpoints during
token generation, causing responses to be cut off mid-sentence during
explicit content. By switching to non-streaming mode for Gemini models,
the full response is generated server-side before being returned,
bypassing the streaming checkpoint mechanism.

- Add handleNonStreamingResponse() for Gemini's JSON response format
- Streaming remains enabled for all non-Gemini models (no UX change)
- Tool call handling preserved in both paths
- finish_reason "SAFETY" detection works in both paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  module-level constant convention used across all other components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add useEffect ref syncs to prevent stale refs in keyboard handler

Root cause: 30+ places call setClips/setCurrentTime/setSelectedClipIds
directly (not through synced wrappers), causing clipsRef, currentTimeRef,
and selectedClipIdsRef to become stale. When Q/W/M shortcuts read these
refs, they see old values and can't find clips at the current position.

Fix: add useEffect syncs for clips, currentTime, selectedClipIds so refs
stay up-to-date regardless of which code path mutates the state.

Also adds debug console.log for Q/W/M shortcuts to verify handler fires
and show actual ref values (check browser DevTools Console).

commit.message:
Fix grey screen on macOS by avoiding Cairo_gtk.create on live GDK windows

On macOS, the GTK2 Quartz backend maps Cairo_gtk.create on a live
GDK window to NSView lockFocus/unlockFocus, which conflicts with
GTK's own drawing lifecycle ("unlockFocus called too many times")
and results in a grey screen. On Linux/X11 this worked fine.

Two fixes:
- Model.ml: use Cairo.Image.create instead of Cairo.Surface.create_similar
  from a dummy GDK pixmap (avoids Quartz-backed surface issues)
- View.ml: composite onto an offscreen GDK pixmap and blit via put_pixmap
  instead of painting directly to the window via Cairo_gtk.create

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add CiliumNetworkPolicy to session namespace to allow intra-cluster traffic

Cilium on NKP overrides standard K8s NetworkPolicy ipBlock rules with its own
default-deny behavior. App pods in the session namespace (demo-loadgen, storefront
services) had all DNS and ClusterIP traffic blocked, causing CrashLoopBackOff on
loadgen and broken inter-service communication.

Add allow-all-intra-cluster CiliumNetworkPolicy to session.objects so every session
namespace allows intra-cluster + world egress/ingress for app pods.

- Kanban-Board mit 4 Spalten (Offen, Versendet, An Kunden, Bezahlt)
- Drag & Drop zum Verschieben zwischen Spalten
- Preisanzeige: VK (Kunde zahlt), EK (an Universal), Marge
- Buttons pro Status: "Tracking an Kunde", "Rechnung" + "Bezahlt"
- Als bezahlt markieren nutzt debitorService für Debitoren-Sync
- Email-Text: "Hallo zusammen, bitte Versand der Ware..."

Shop-Bestellungen:
- Duplikat-Erkennung bei Universal/Eigen-Projekt-Erstellung
- Suffix -U (Universal) und -E (Eigen) für AB-Nummern
- "Projekt öffnen" statt "Erstellen" wenn bereits vorhanden

RabenRechner:
- Gewicht-Clamping erst bei onBlur (nicht während Eingabe)

Allgemein:
- ErrorBoundary für bessere Fehlerbehandlung
- lazyWithRetry für robusteres Lazy Loading
- Auth-Timeout gegen Blackscreen
- NumericInput mit suffix, debounce, Anti-Scroll
- GlobalSearch Spotlight-Suche (Cmd+K)
